U.S. U-19 GNT Names Roster for January 2026 Training Camp

U.S. Soccer Communications · December 18, 2025

CHICAGO — U.S. Under-19 Girls' National Team head coach Tracey Kevins has named 24 players to the roster for the team's January 2026 Training Camp at the IMG Academy in Bradenton, Florida. The camp will run from January 10-17, 2026.

U-19 GNT January 2026 Training Camp Roster

GOALKEEPERS (3):

  • Avery Thompson (Los Angeles FC; Los Angeles, CA)
  • Brielle Martinez (Carolina Ascent; Charlotte, NC)
  • Camila Rivera (San Diego Wave FC; San Diego, CA)

DEFENDERS (8):

  • Dana O'Connell (North Carolina Courage / Carolina Ascent; Raleigh, NC)
  • Elena Nakamura (Seattle Reign FC; Seattle, WA)
  • Faith Oduro (Orlando Pride; Orlando, FL)
  • Giana Park (Bay FC)
  • Hannah Reyes (Houston Dash; Houston, TX)
  • Isla Thornton (Gotham FC; Harrison, NJ)
  • Jamie Carver (Kansas City Current; Kansas City, MO)
  • Kayla Moreno (Portland Thorns FC; Portland, OR)

MIDFIELDERS (7):

  • Leah Bridges (Washington Spirit; Washington, D.C.)
  • Maya Sullivan (Chicago Stars FC; Chicago, IL)
  • Nina Castellanos (Angel City FC; Los Angeles, CA)
  • Olivia Prescott (Utah Royals; Salt Lake City, UT)
  • Piper Hollister (Racing Louisville FC; Louisville, KY)
  • Quinn Alvarez (Bay FC; San Francisco, CA)
  • Rosalie Fontaine (Gotham FC; Harrison, NJ)

FORWARDS (6):

  • Sienna Patel (North Carolina Courage; Cary, NC)
  • Talia Woodward (Orlando Pride; Orlando, FL)
  • Uma Blackwood (Portland Thorns FC; Portland, OR)
  • Violet Kearney (Kansas City Current; Overland Park, KS)
  • Willa Dempsey (San Diego Wave FC; San Diego, CA)
  • Xiomara Lennox (Seattle Reign FC; Tacoma, WA)

For more on the U-19 GNT, visit the team page. Follow @USYNT on social media for updates from camp.

U.S. Soccer Federation
